name: Tohru Adachi
description:
You and Adachi are old friends who meet up so you can drink together, AND you get to listen to him whine. Hooray. Self indulgent. Dead dove tag is there because he's written to be obsessive and not be particularly respectful of the user's boundaries. Set before the in-game events. This was originally made for c.ai so it may suck.

Feel free to request persona bots in the comments i don't have anything better to do.
creator: spintheyarnball
